name: Pawn Jewelry - Coral Gables, Miami
description_short: Gables Pawn & Jewelry offers collateral loans from $200–$500K+ on luxury watches, diamonds, and fine jewelry with no credit check, plus buying, selling, and watch repair.
description_long:
Gables Pawn & Jewelry has operated from the same Miami location since 1986, founded by Howard Bilford, who has been trading high-grade timepieces since 1980. The firm is one of the nation's largest wholesale and retail buyers of pre-owned luxury watches and holds memberships in the International Watch & Jewelry Guild (IWJG), the National Association of Watch & Clock Collectors (NAWCC), and the Polygon Trading Network — an exclusive industry B2B platform for professional dealers. These credentials distinguish it from a typical pawn shop and position it squarely within the professional luxury resale and collateral lending market.

The core service is short-term collateral lending: customers leave a luxury watch, diamond, or piece of fine jewelry as security and receive a cash loan ranging from $200 to over $500,000. Interest accrues at approximately 10% per month — a $500 loan costs $550 to redeem after 30 days. Loans are renewable indefinitely by paying monthly interest on time; forfeiture of the collateral occurs after 60 days of non-payment, and crucially, there is no credit reporting on defaults or late payments. Beyond lending, Gables Pawn buys outright and retails pre-owned luxury pieces across brands including Rolex, Patek Philippe, Cartier, Audemars Piguet, Vacheron Constantin, Breitling, and Panerai, as well as signed jewelry from houses like Van Cleef & Arpels, Harry Winston, and Tiffany & Co. Watch repair and servicing — backed by a one-year warranty — and layaway plans for purchases round out the offering. Bilingual staff (English and Spanish) serve Miami's diverse clientele.

What sets Gables Pawn apart is its singular focus on high-end luxury. Unlike general pawn shops that accept electronics, tools, and household goods, Gables operates exclusively in watches, diamonds, fine jewelry, gold, and platinum, attracting a clientele of collectors, estate sellers, and individuals with significant assets. With 38-plus years at the same South Florida address and a 5.0 Google rating across 116 reviews, the firm's longevity and word-of-mouth reputation are its clearest differentiators in a market where trust and expertise determine appraised values and loan offers.

Gables Pawn is a strong option for anyone holding a high-value luxury item who needs fast, confidential liquidity without a credit check or credit score consequences. The main limitation is cost: 10% monthly interest translates to roughly 120% APR, which makes this financing viable only as a true short-term bridge. There is no online portal for managing loans — all transactions are conducted in person during business hours (Monday–Saturday, approximately 10:30 AM–5:30 PM). BBB accreditation and rating are unverified, with no public BBB profile found. Customers with common or mid-range items will not qualify, as the business is structured exclusively around luxury collateral.
address: 1 Alhambra Plz Floor PH, #1418, Coral Gables, FL 33134

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee stated. Watch repair service includes a 1-year warranty on serviced watches.

certifications: NAWCC — National Association of Watch & Clock Collectors

pros: Founded in 1986 — 38+ years in business at the same Miami location with consistent ownership
Loan amounts from $200 to $500,000+, accommodating both modest and very high-value luxury items
No credit check required and no credit reporting on defaults — zero impact on borrower's credit score
Specializes in top luxury brands: Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Cartier, Van Cleef & Arpels, and others
Professional industry memberships: IWJG, NAWCC, and original Polygon Trading Network member
Bilingual staff (English and Spanish) — well-suited for Miami's diverse Spanish-speaking community
Watch repair backed by a 1-year warranty; layaway available for retail purchases
cons: Interest rate of approximately 10% per month (~120% APR equivalent) — far higher than traditional personal loans or credit cards
Collateral must be high-end luxury — everyday jewelry, electronics, or mid-range watches will not qualify
No online portal for loan management; all transactions require an in-person visit during business hours
Closed Sundays; limited to Monday–Saturday ~10:30 AM–5:30 PM, which may be inconvenient for working clients
No BBB profile or accreditation found — independent verification of dispute resolution practices is unavailable
best_for: South Florida residents who own luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, AP) and need fast short-term cash without a credit check
Collectors and professional dealers buying or selling pre-owned high-end timepieces in the Miami market
Individuals facing a short-term liquidity gap who want to recover their collateral within 30–90 days
Spanish-speaking clients in Coral Gables and Miami-Dade needing bilingual luxury pawn services
diagnosis: Gables Pawn & Jewelry is best suited for South Florida owners of genuine luxury assets — primarily high-end watches and fine jewelry — who need fast, confidential cash without any credit involvement. With 38 years of operation and professional industry credentials, it is one of the most established luxury pawn brokers in Florida. The primary caveat is cost: at roughly 10% per month, this is appropriate only as a short-term bridge loan, not as ongoing financing, and the collateral threshold means it is inaccessible to anyone without high-value luxury items.
services: Collateral pawn loans on luxury watches ($200–$500,000+)
Collateral pawn loans on diamonds and fine jewelry
Collateral pawn loans on gold and platinum
Outright purchase of pre-owned luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Cartier, Breitling, Omega, Panerai, Vacheron Constantin)
Outright purchase of signed designer jewelry (Cartier, Van Cleef & Arpels, Harry Winston, Tiffany & Co., Bvlgari)
Retail and wholesale sales of pre-owned luxury watches and jewelry
Watch repair and servicing with 1-year warranty
Bilingual service in English and Spanish
meta_description: Gables Pawn & Jewelry offers collateral loans on luxury watches, diamonds, and fine jewelry with no credit check.
